business_ideas.idea: Myers-Briggs Type Indicator: personality test charging $15-40 per test, $2000 practitioner certification, $20M+ annual revenue.
Clifton StrengthsFinder 2.0: Gallup's personality assessment product, similar test-as-business model.
Grit Score Test: Angela Duckworth's personality/mindset assessment based on passion and perseverance.
Cognition Labs Devon: AI software engineer that writes code from natural language, raised $21M.
Lunchclub: social platform for networking lunches between tech professionals, raised $30M at $100M valuation.
David Bar by RXBAR founder: premium protein bar ($299/month, 160 cal, 28g protein, sugar-free) post-$600M exit.
E-commerce speedrun companies: serial founder rebuilding successful e-commerce brands leveraging existing playbook.

predictions.text: Cognition Labs' Devon is the first AI that matches or exceeds human programmer capability for real tasks.
Talent filters like math Olympiads and programming competitions predict startup success better than traditional credentials.
